title: HardcoreHearts
description: Makes the heart icons look HARDCORE
body:
# The Resource Pack

It just changes your healthbar to look like the hardcore healthbar

## Features

- Changes normal hearts
- Changes Frozen hearts
- Changes Poisoned hearts
- Changes Withered hearts
- Changes Absorption hearts

# Technical

The, less so, but still important bits.

## Installation

Simply move the _.zip_ to your _"resourcepacks"_ folder in your minecraft directory.

## Links

My [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@JJplayz565) and my [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/jjplayz565).

Check out my [other resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/noarmouricons).

Check out my [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/murgers)
